ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "input_value" TEXT /* Input value for the compound (e.g., CAS-RN, SMILES) */,
  "found_by" TEXT /* Method used to find the compound (e.g., CAS-RN, SMILES) */,
  "dtxsid" TEXT /* DTXSID for the compound */,
  "preferred_name" TEXT /* Preferred name of the compound */,
  "dtxcid" TEXT /* DTXCID for the compound */,
  "casrn" TEXT /* CASRN for the compound */,
  "qsar_ready_smiles" TEXT /* QSAR-ready SMILES for the compound */,
  "compound_type" TEXT /* Type of compound (e.g., organic, inorganic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the compound record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the compound record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the compound data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_values" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input value */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the input value belongs to */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input value (e.g., CAS-RN, SMILES) */,
  "input_value" TEXT /* Value of the input (e.g., 60-35-5, CC(N)=O) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the input value was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the input value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_values_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dtxsids" (
  "dtxsid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DTXSID */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the DTXSID belongs to */,
  "dtxsid" TEXT /* DTXSID value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the DTXSID was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the DTXSID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dtxsid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dtxsids_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dtxcids" (
  "dtxcid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DTXCID */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the DTXCID belongs to */,
  "dtxcid" TEXT /* DTXCID value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the DTXCID was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the DTXCID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dtxcid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dtxcids_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casrns" (
  "casrn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CASRN */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the CASRN belongs to */,
  "casrn" TEXT /* CASRN value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the CASRN was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the CASRN */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casrn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casrns_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qsar_models" (
  "qsar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QSAR model */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the QSAR model belongs to */,
  "qsar_model" TEXT /* QSAR model value */,
  "qsar_ready_smiles" TEXT /* QSAR-ready SMILES for the compound */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the QSAR model was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the QSAR model */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the QSAR model (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qsar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qsar_models_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the compound */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the compound */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., molecular weight, boiling point) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the property was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the property */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the property data (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_properties_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazards" (
  "hazard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazard */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the hazard belongs to */,
  "hazard_name" TEXT /* Name of the hazard (e.g., toxic, flammable) */,
  "hazard_description" TEXT /* Description of the hazard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the hazard was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the hazard */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the hazard (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazards_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
